projects.name: creditcardfrauddetection-mlops
projects.description: End-to-end credit card fraud detection system with MLOps pipeline. Supports Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and XGBoost models with natural language explanations via LangChain/OpenAI. Features risk segmentation, Docker containerization, and DVC for data versioning.

projects.name: email-phishing-detection
projects.description: Advanced email phishing analyzer that inspects .eml/.msg files using multi-layered analysis: SPF/DKIM/DMARC header checks, URL extraction with typosquatting detection, attachment hashing with OCR via Tesseract, VirusTotal API integration, and AI-powered scoring (0-10) with CLEAN/SUSPICIOUS/MALICIOUS verdicts.

projects.name: stockastic
projects.description: ML-powered stock price prediction app built with Streamlit. Fetches real-time data via YFinance, trains ARIMA models from StatsModels, and generates multi-day forecasts with interactive Plotly charts. Includes backtesting capabilities for model validation.

projects.name: socialecho
projects.description: Full-stack social networking platform with automated NLP-based content moderation. Uses Perspective API for toxicity detection, TextRazor for categorization, and Hugging Face BART for zero-shot classification. Includes context-based authentication, posts, comments, likes, and follow system.

projects.name: time-series-forecasting-python
projects.description: Comprehensive time series analysis and forecasting tutorial using the Beijing air quality dataset. Covers decomposition, stationarity tests (Dickey-Fuller, AC/PAC plots), transforms (differencing, log scale, smoothing), and models including AR, MA, and ARIMA.

projects.name: jwt-express-typeorm
projects.description: Enterprise-grade REST API starter with stateless JWT authentication and role-based authorization. Built with TypeScript, Express.js, and TypeORM with SQLite, designed as a base template for scalable backend services.

projects.name: mern-ecommerce-rishi
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce application with product reviews, wishlists, order management, shopping cart, and admin panel. Features secure OTP-based authentication, password reset, and Redux Toolkit state management with Material UI frontend.
